member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaBulkResult
member.summary: Bulk insert operation result.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaBulkResult.TotalInserted
member.summary: Total number of rows inserted.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaBulkResult.BatchCount
member.summary: Number of batches processed.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaBulkResult.PendingCount
member.summary: Number of rows in the final partial batch (0 if none).

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaBulkResult.Duration
member.summary: Total duration of the operation.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaBulkResult.Errors
member.summary: Any errors encountered.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaBulkResult.IsSuccess
member.summary: Whether the operation was successful.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaBulkInserter
member.summary: High-performance bulk inserter for VedaDB. Buffers rows and flushes in configurable batch sizes.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaBulkInserter.TotalInserted
member.summary: Total rows inserted so far.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaBulkInserter.BufferSize
member.summary: Current buffer size.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaBulkInserter.BatchCount
member.summary: Number of batches flushed.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaBulkInserter.HasPendingRows
member.summary: Whether there are pending rows in the buffer.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaBulkInserter.#ctor(VedaDB.VedaClient,System.String,System.String[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Create a bulk inserter.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaBulkInserter.#ctor(VedaDB.VedaClient,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Create a bulk inserter with columns inferred from the first row.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaBulkInserter.AddAsync(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Add a row to the buffer. Flushes if buffer reaches batch size.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaBulkInserter.AddAsync(System.Object,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Add a row from an anonymous object or typed object.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaBulkInserter.AddRangeAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Add multiple rows at once.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaBulkInserter.FlushAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Flush the current buffer to the database.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaBulkInserter.ExecuteAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute the entire bulk insert, flushing all pending rows.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaBulkInserter.DisposeAsync
member.summary: Flush any remaining rows and dispose.

member.name: T:VedaDB.ChangeEventType
member.summary: Type of change event.

member.name: F:VedaDB.ChangeEventType.Insert
member.summary: A row was inserted.

member.name: F:VedaDB.ChangeEventType.Update
member.summary: A row was updated.

member.name: F:VedaDB.ChangeEventType.Delete
member.summary: A row was deleted.

member.name: F:VedaDB.ChangeEventType.Schema
member.summary: Table schema changed.

member.name: F:VedaDB.ChangeEventType.Unknown
member.summary: Unknown change type.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaChangeEvent
member.summary: A change event from a watched table.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaChangeEvent.Type
member.summary: Type of change.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaChangeEvent.Table
member.summary: Table name.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaChangeEvent.Row
member.summary: Changed row data.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaChangeEvent.PreviousRow
member.summary: Previous row data (for updates).

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaChangeEvent.Timestamp
member.summary: Timestamp of the change.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaChangeEvent.TransactionId
member.summary: Transaction ID if applicable.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaChangeEvent.Position
member.summary: Position in the change stream.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaChangeStreamConfig
member.summary: Configuration for change streams.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaChangeStreamConfig.PollInterval
member.summary: Polling interval. Default is 1 second.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaChangeStreamConfig.BatchSize
member.summary: Maximum events to return per batch. Default is 100.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaChangeStreamConfig.FilterTypes
member.summary: Event types to filter for. Empty means all types.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaChangeStreamConfig.StartPosition
member.summary: Start from a specific position. 0 means from the beginning.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaChangeStream
member.summary: Change stream for watching table changes in real-time. Implements IAsyncEnumerable for streaming consumption.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaChangeStream.#ctor(VedaDB.VedaClient,System.String,VedaDB.VedaChangeStreamConfig)
member.summary: Create a change stream.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaChangeStream.PollOnceAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Poll for changes once and return events.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaChangeStream.GetAsyncEnumerator(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get the IAsyncEnumerator for streaming changes.

member.name: T:VedaDB.CircuitState
member.summary: States for the circuit breaker pattern.

member.name: F:VedaDB.CircuitState.Closed
member.summary: Circuit is closed, requests flow through normally.

member.name: F:VedaDB.CircuitState.Open
member.summary: Circuit is open, requests are rejected immediately.

member.name: F:VedaDB.CircuitState.HalfOpen
member.summary: Circuit is half-open, allowing a test request.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaCircuitBreakerConfig
member.summary: Configuration for the circuit breaker.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaCircuitBreakerConfig.FailureThreshold
member.summary: Number of failures before opening the circuit. Default is 5.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaCircuitBreakerConfig.RecoveryTimeoutSeconds
member.summary: Time before transitioning from Open to HalfOpen in seconds. Default is 30.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaCircuitBreakerConfig.SuccessThreshold
member.summary: Number of consecutive successes in HalfOpen to close the circuit. Default is 2.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaCircuitBreakerConfig.FailureWindowSeconds
member.summary: Window duration for counting failures in seconds. Default is 60.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaCircuitBreaker
member.summary: Circuit breaker pattern implementation for VedaDB connections. Prevents cascading failures by rejecting requests when the system is unhealthy.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaCircuitBreaker.State
member.summary: Current state of the circuit.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaCircuitBreaker.FailureCount
member.summary: Number of failures in the current window.

member.name: E:VedaDB.VedaCircuitBreaker.StateChanged
member.summary: Event raised when the circuit state changes.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaCircuitBreaker.#ctor
member.summary: Create a circuit breaker with default configuration.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaCircuitBreaker.#ctor(VedaDB.VedaCircuitBreakerConfig)
member.summary: Create a circuit breaker with specified configuration.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaCircuitBreaker.ExecuteAsync``1(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute an operation through the circuit breaker.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaCircuitBreaker.ExecuteAsync(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute an operation without return value.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaCircuitBreaker.RecordSuccess
member.summary: Record a successful operation.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaCircuitBreaker.RecordFailure
member.summary: Record a failed operation.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaCircuitBreaker.CanExecute
member.summary: Check if an operation can be executed.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaCircuitBreaker.Reset
member.summary: Manually reset the circuit to closed state.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaEventArgs
member.summary: Event arguments for VedaDB connection events.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaEventArgs.Host
member.summary: Host of the connected server.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaEventArgs.Port
member.summary: Port of the connected server.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaEventArgs.Timestamp
member.summary: Timestamp of the event.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaErrorEventArgs
member.summary: Event arguments for VedaDB error events.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaErrorEventArgs.Exception
member.summary: The exception that occurred.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaErrorEventArgs.Command
member.summary: The SQL command being executed when the error occurred.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaErrorEventArgs.Timestamp
member.summary: Timestamp of the error.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaQueryEventArgs
member.summary: Event arguments for VedaDB query events.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaQueryEventArgs.Command
member.summary: The SQL command that was executed.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaQueryEventArgs.Parameters
member.summary: Parameters used in the query.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaQueryEventArgs.Duration
member.summary: Duration of the query.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaQueryEventArgs.RowCount
member.summary: Number of rows returned or affected.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaQueryEventArgs.IsSuccess
member.summary: Whether the query was successful.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaQueryEventArgs.Timestamp
member.summary: Timestamp of the query.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaClient
member.summary: Core VedaDB .NET client driver. Supports TLS encryption, authentication, connection pooling, retries, circuit breaker, query caching, and all 20 production features.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaClient.LastHost
member.summary: Host of the connected server.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaClient.LastPort
member.summary: Port of the connected server.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaClient.IsConnected
member.summary: Whether the client is connected.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaClient.IsTls
member.summary: Whether TLS is active.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaClient.IsAuthenticated
member.summary: Whether the client is authenticated.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaClient.Protocol
member.summary: The underlying protocol handler.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaClient.CircuitBreaker
member.summary: The circuit breaker instance (if configured).

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaClient.QueryCache
member.summary: The query cache instance (if configured).

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaClient.RetryPolicy
member.summary: The retry policy instance (if configured).

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaClient.Interceptors
member.summary: The interceptor pipeline.

member.name: E:VedaDB.VedaClient.Connected
member.summary: Raised when the client connects to a server.

member.name: E:VedaDB.VedaClient.Error
member.summary: Raised when an error occurs.

member.name: E:VedaDB.VedaClient.QueryExecuted
member.summary: Raised when a query is executed.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.#ctor(VedaDB.VedaConfig)
member.summary: Create a client with the specified configuration.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Create a client with a connection string.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.ConnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connect to the server.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.Connect
member.summary: Connect synchronously.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.ConnectAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Connect to a VedaDB server from a URI string.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.FromURI(System.String)
member.summary: Create a client from a URI string (without connecting).

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.QueryAsync(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Execute a SQL query and return the result set.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.ExecuteAsync(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Execute a non-query command (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE/DDL). Returns the number of affected rows.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.Query(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Execute a query synchronously.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.PingAsync
member.summary: Ping the server to check connectivity.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.CloseAsync
member.summary: Close the connection gracefully.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.CreatePipeline
member.summary: Create a command pipeline for batching operations.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.CreateBulkInserter(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Create a bulk inserter for the specified table.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.CreateCursor(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Create a streaming cursor for large result sets.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.CreatePubSub
member.summary: Create a Pub/Sub messaging instance.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.WatchAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Watch a table for changes, returning an async enumerable of change events.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.Table(System.String)
member.summary: Create a fluent query builder for a table.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.InsertAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Insert a row into a table.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.SelectAsync(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Select rows from a table.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.UpdateAsync(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.String)
member.summary: Update rows in a table.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.DeleteAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Delete rows from a table.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.BeginAsync
member.summary: Begin a transaction.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.CommitAsync
member.summary: Commit the current transaction.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.RollbackAsync
member.summary: Rollback the current transaction.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.TransactionAsync``1(System.Func{VedaDB.VedaClient,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}})
member.summary: Execute a function inside a transaction.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.PrepareAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Prepare a named statement on the server.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.ExecutePreparedAsync(System.String,System.String[])
member.summary: Execute a prepared statement.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.CacheSetAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Set a cache key with TTL.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.CacheGetAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Get a cached value.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.CacheDelAsync(System.String)
member.summary: Delete a cached value.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.SearchAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Perform a fuzzy search on a table.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.GraphAddNodeAsync(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add a node to the graph.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.GraphBFSAsync(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Perform a breadth-first search on the graph.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.ShowTablesAsync
member.summary: List all tables.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.ReconnectAsync(System.Int32)
member.summary: Reconnect to the server with backoff.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.Dispose
member.summary: Dispose the client and release all resources.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaClient.DisposeAsync
member.summary: Dispose the client asynchronously.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaConfig
member.summary: Configuration for the VedaDB client.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaConfig.Host
member.summary: Server hostname. Default is "localhost".

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaConfig.Port
member.summary: Server port. Default is 6380.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaConfig.TimeoutMs
member.summary: Connection timeout in milliseconds. Default is 30000.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaConfig.Username
member.summary: Username for authentication.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaConfig.Password
member.summary: Password for authentication.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaConfig.Tls
member.summary: TLS configuration.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaConfig.Database
member.summary: Database name.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaConfig.PoolMinSize
member.summary: Connection pool minimum size. Default is 2.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaConfig.PoolMaxSize
member.summary: Connection pool maximum size. Default is 20.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaConfig.PoolAcquireTimeout
member.summary: Connection pool acquire timeout. Default is 10 seconds.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaConfig.PoolMaxIdleTime
member.summary: Connection pool max idle time. Default is 5 minutes.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaConfig.Retry
member.summary: Retry policy configuration. Null means no retries.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaConfig.CircuitBreaker
member.summary: Circuit breaker configuration. Null means no circuit breaker.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaConfig.Cache
member.summary: Query cache configuration. Null means no caching.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaConfig.Options
member.summary: Additional connection options.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaPoolConfig
member.summary: Configuration for the VedaDB connection pool.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaPoolConfig.MinSize
member.summary: Minimum number of connections in the pool. Default is 2.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaPoolConfig.MaxSize
member.summary: Maximum number of connections in the pool. Default is 20.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaPoolConfig.AcquireTimeout
member.summary: Timeout for acquiring a connection. Default is 10 seconds.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaPoolConfig.MaxIdleTime
member.summary: Maximum idle time before a connection is closed. Default is 5 minutes.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaPoolConfig.MaintenanceInterval
member.summary: Interval for maintenance tasks. Default is 30 seconds.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaPoolStats
member.summary: Connection pool statistics.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaPoolStats.IdleCount
member.summary: Number of idle connections.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaPoolStats.ActiveCount
member.summary: Number of active (checked-out) connections.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaPoolStats.TotalCount
member.summary: Total number of connections.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaPoolStats.MaxSize
member.summary: Maximum pool size.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaPoolStats.WaiterCount
member.summary: Number of waiters blocked waiting for a connection.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaPoolStats.TotalAcquired
member.summary: Total number of acquired connections.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaPoolStats.TotalReleased
member.summary: Total number of released connections.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaPoolStats.TotalCreated
member.summary: Number of connection creations.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaPoolStats.TotalDisposed
member.summary: Number of connection disposals.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaPooledConnection
member.summary: Pooled connection wrapper that returns to pool on dispose.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaPooledConnection.Client
member.summary: The underlying client.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaConnectionPool
member.summary: Thread-safe async connection pool for VedaDB. Supports min/max sizing, connection timeouts, idle reaping, and health validation.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaConnectionPool.MinSize
member.summary: Minimum pool size.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaConnectionPool.MaxSize
member.summary: Maximum pool size.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaConnectionPool.AcquireTimeout
member.summary: Timeout for acquiring a connection.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaConnectionPool.Stats
member.summary: Current pool statistics.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaConnectionPool.#ctor(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{VedaDB.VedaClient}})
member.summary: Create a connection pool with default configuration.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaConnectionPool.#ctor(VedaDB.VedaPoolConfig,System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{VedaDB.VedaClient}})
member.summary: Create a connection pool with specified configuration.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaConnectionPool.FromConfig(VedaDB.VedaConfig)
member.summary: Create a connection pool from a VedaConfig.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaConnectionPool.AcquireAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Acquire a connection from the pool.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaConnectionPool.AcquirePooledAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Acquire a connection with automatic return on dispose.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaConnectionPool.Release(VedaDB.VedaClient)
member.summary: Release a connection back to the pool.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaConnectionPool.ReleaseAsync(VedaDB.VedaClient)
member.summary: Release a connection back to the pool asynchronously.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaConnectionPool.DrainAsync
member.summary: Drain all connections from the pool.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaCursor
member.summary: Streaming cursor for large result sets. Fetches rows in batches to minimize memory usage.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaCursor.TotalRowsReturned
member.summary: Total rows returned so far.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaCursor.IsFinished
member.summary: Whether the cursor has finished reading.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaCursor.#ctor(VedaDB.VedaClient,System.String,System.Object[],System.Int32)
member.summary: Create a streaming cursor.
member.param: Number of rows to fetch per batch.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaCursor.ReadNextBatchAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Read the next batch of rows.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaCursor.ReadAllAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Read all remaining rows into a list.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaCursor.GetAsyncEnumerator(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Get the IAsyncEnumerator for streaming.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaException
member.summary: Base exception for all VedaDB errors.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaConnectionException
member.summary: Thrown when a connection to VedaDB fails or is lost.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaQueryException
member.summary: Thrown when VedaDB returns a query error.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaCircuitBreakerOpenException
member.summary: Thrown when a circuit breaker is open.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaRetryExhaustedException
member.summary: Thrown when all retries are exhausted.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaFailoverException
member.summary: Thrown when a failover operation fails.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaPoolExhaustedException
member.summary: Thrown when the connection pool is exhausted.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaBulkInsertException
member.summary: Thrown when a bulk insert operation fails.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaUriParseException
member.summary: Thrown when a URI parse operation fails.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaInterceptorException
member.summary: Thrown when an interceptor rejects an operation.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaFailoverConfig
member.summary: Configuration for failover behavior.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaFailoverConfig.FailoverNodes
member.summary: List of failover nodes in priority order.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaFailoverConfig.MaxFailoverAttempts
member.summary: Maximum number of failover attempts. Default is 3.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaFailoverConfig.FailoverDelay
member.summary: Delay between failover attempts. Default is 5 seconds.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaFailoverConfig.AutoFailback
member.summary: Whether to automatically fail back to the primary when it recovers.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaFailoverConfig.FailbackCheckInterval
member.summary: Health check interval for failback detection. Default is 30 seconds.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaFailover
member.summary: Failover manager for VedaDB connections. Automatically switches to backup nodes when the primary fails.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaFailover.CurrentClient
member.summary: The currently active client.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaFailover.IsFailoverActive
member.summary: Whether the connection is using a failover node (not primary).

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaFailover.CurrentNodeIndex
member.summary: Index of the current node (0 = primary).

member.name: E:VedaDB.VedaFailover.FailoverOccurred
member.summary: Event raised when failover occurs.

member.name: E:VedaDB.VedaFailover.FailbackOccurred
member.summary: Event raised when failback to primary occurs.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaFailover.#ctor(VedaDB.VedaFailoverConfig,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Create a failover manager.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaFailover.InitializeAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Initialize the failover manager, connecting to the primary.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaFailover.ExecuteAsync``1(System.Func{VedaDB.VedaClient,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute an operation with automatic failover.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaFailover.ExecuteAsync(System.Func{VedaDB.VedaClient,System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute an operation without return value with automatic failover.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaFailover.FailoverAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Manually trigger failover to the next available node.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaFailover.FailbackAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Manually failback to the primary node.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaHealthStatus
member.summary: Health status of a VedaDB node.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaHealthStatus.IsHealthy
member.summary: Whether the node is healthy.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaHealthStatus.Host
member.summary: Server host.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaHealthStatus.Port
member.summary: Server port.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaHealthStatus.ResponseTime
member.summary: Response time of the last health check.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaHealthStatus.LastChecked
member.summary: Timestamp of the last health check.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaHealthStatus.Error
member.summary: Error message if unhealthy.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaHealthStatus.ConsecutiveFailures
member.summary: Number of consecutive failures.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaHealthStatus.ConsecutiveSuccesses
member.summary: Number of consecutive successes.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaHealthCheckerConfig
member.summary: Configuration for health checking.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaHealthCheckerConfig.CheckInterval
member.summary: Interval between health checks. Default is 10 seconds.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaHealthCheckerConfig.CheckTimeout
member.summary: Timeout for each health check. Default is 5 seconds.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaHealthCheckerConfig.UnhealthyThreshold
member.summary: Number of consecutive failures before marking unhealthy. Default is 3.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaHealthCheckerConfig.HealthyThreshold
member.summary: Number of consecutive successes before marking healthy. Default is 2.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaHealthChecker
member.summary: Health checker for VedaDB nodes. Periodically pings servers and tracks health status.

member.name: E:VedaDB.VedaHealthChecker.StatusChanged
member.summary: Event raised when a node's health status changes.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaHealthChecker.#ctor
member.summary: Create a health checker with default configuration.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaHealthChecker.#ctor(VedaDB.VedaHealthCheckerConfig)
member.summary: Create a health checker with specified configuration.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaHealthChecker.RegisterNode(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Register a node for health checking.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaHealthChecker.UnregisterNode(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Unregister a node from health checking.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaHealthChecker.GetStatus(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Get the health status of a node.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaHealthChecker.GetAllStatuses
member.summary: Get all health statuses.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaHealthChecker.GetHealthyNodes
member.summary: Get only healthy nodes.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaHealthChecker.IsHealthy(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Check if a node is currently healthy.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaHealthChecker.CheckAsync(System.String,System.Int32,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Perform a single health check on a node.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaInterceptorContext
member.summary: Context for intercepted operations.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaInterceptorContext.Command
member.summary: The SQL command being executed.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaInterceptorContext.Parameters
member.summary: Parameters for the command.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaInterceptorContext.Operation
member.summary: Operation type (query, execute, etc.).

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaInterceptorContext.Data
member.summary: Additional context data.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaInterceptorContext.IsHandled
member.summary: Whether the operation was handled (skip further processing).

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaInterceptorContext.HandledResult
member.summary: Result to return if IsHandled is true.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaInterceptorContext.HandledException
member.summary: Exception to throw if IsHandled is true and this is set.

member.name: T:VedaDB.IVedaInterceptor
member.summary: Middleware interceptor for VedaDB operations. Allows cross-cutting concerns like logging, authentication, and rate limiting.

member.name: M:VedaDB.IVedaInterceptor.OnBeforeAsync(VedaDB.VedaInterceptorContext,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Called before a command is executed.

member.name: M:VedaDB.IVedaInterceptor.OnAfterAsync(VedaDB.VedaInterceptorContext,VedaDB.VedaResult,System.TimeSpan,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Called after a command is executed.

member.name: M:VedaDB.IVedaInterceptor.OnErrorAsync(VedaDB.VedaInterceptorContext,System.Exception,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Called when an exception occurs.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaInterceptorPipeline
member.summary: Pipeline of interceptors that process operations in order.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaInterceptorPipeline.Add(VedaDB.IVedaInterceptor)
member.summary: Add an interceptor to the pipeline.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaInterceptorPipeline.Remove(VedaDB.IVedaInterceptor)
member.summary: Remove an interceptor from the pipeline.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaInterceptorPipeline.ExecuteAsync(VedaDB.VedaInterceptorContext,System.Func{System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{VedaDB.VedaResult}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute an operation through the interceptor pipeline.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaInterceptorPipeline.Count
member.summary: Number of interceptors in the pipeline.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaLoggingInterceptor
member.summary: Built-in logging interceptor.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaLoggingInterceptor.#ctor(System.Action{System.String})
member.summary: Create a logging interceptor with the specified log action.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaLoggingInterceptor.#ctor
member.summary: Create a logging interceptor that writes to Console.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaMetricsInterceptor
member.summary: Built-in metrics interceptor.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaRetryInterceptor
member.summary: Built-in retry interceptor.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaRetryInterceptor.ExecuteWithRetryAsync(VedaDB.VedaInterceptorContext,System.Func{System.Threading.CancellationToken,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{VedaDB.VedaResult}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute with retry through this interceptor.

member.name: T:VedaDB.LoadBalanceStrategy
member.summary: Strategy for selecting a node from the pool.

member.name: F:VedaDB.LoadBalanceStrategy.RoundRobin
member.summary: Round-robin selection.

member.name: F:VedaDB.LoadBalanceStrategy.Random
member.summary: Random selection.

member.name: F:VedaDB.LoadBalanceStrategy.LeastConnections
member.summary: Least connections.

member.name: F:VedaDB.LoadBalanceStrategy.WeightedRoundRobin
member.summary: Weighted round-robin.

member.name: F:VedaDB.LoadBalanceStrategy.IPHash
member.summary: IP hash for sticky sessions.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaNode
member.summary: A node in the load balancer pool.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaNode.Host
member.summary: Node host.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaNode.Port
member.summary: Node port.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaNode.Weight
member.summary: Node weight (for weighted strategies).

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaNode.IsHealthy
member.summary: Whether the node is currently healthy.

member.name: F:VedaDB.VedaNode.ActiveConnections
member.summary: Current number of active connections.

member.name: F:VedaDB.VedaNode.TotalRequests
member.summary: Total requests handled.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaNode.Id
member.summary: Node identifier.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaLoadBalancer
member.summary: Load balancer for distributing requests across multiple VedaDB nodes.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaLoadBalancer.#ctor(VedaDB.LoadBalanceStrategy)
member.summary: Create a load balancer.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaLoadBalancer.AddNode(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Add a node to the pool.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaLoadBalancer.RemoveNode(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Remove a node from the pool.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaLoadBalancer.SetNodeHealth(System.String,System.Int32,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Update node health status.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaLoadBalancer.GetNodes
member.summary: Get all registered nodes.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaLoadBalancer.GetHealthyNodes
member.summary: Get only healthy nodes.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaLoadBalancer.SelectNode(System.String)
member.summary: Select the next node based on the configured strategy.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaLoadBalancer.ReleaseNode(VedaDB.VedaNode)
member.summary: Release a connection back to the pool, decrementing active count.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaLoadBalancer.ExecuteAsync``1(System.Func{VedaDB.VedaNode,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.String)
member.summary: Execute an operation on a selected node.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaLoadBalancer.GetStats
member.summary: Get pool statistics.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaLoadBalancerStats
member.summary: Statistics for the load balancer.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaMetrics
member.summary: Metrics collector for VedaDB driver operations. Emits Prometheus-compatible text format for scraping.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaMetrics.Enabled
member.summary: Whether metrics collection is enabled.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaMetrics.Increment(System.String,System.Int64,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Increment a counter metric.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaMetrics.Gauge(System.String,System.Double,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Set a gauge metric.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaMetrics.Histogram(System.String,System.Double,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String})
member.summary: Record a value in a histogram.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaMetrics.TimerStart(System.String)
member.summary: Start a timer for an operation.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaMetrics.TimerStop(System.String)
member.summary: Stop a timer and record the duration in seconds.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaMetrics.Counters
member.summary: Get all counter values.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaMetrics.Gauges
member.summary: Get all gauge values.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaMetrics.Reset
member.summary: Reset all metrics.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaMetrics.ExportPrometheus
member.summary: Export metrics in Prometheus text format.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaPipelineCommand
member.summary: A single command in a pipeline.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaPipelineCommand.Sql
member.summary: SQL command text.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaPipelineCommand.Parameters
member.summary: Parameters for the command.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaPipelineCommand.IsWrite
member.summary: Whether this is a write operation.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaPipelineResult
member.summary: Pipeline execution result.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaPipelineResult.Results
member.summary: Results for each command in order.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaPipelineResult.Errors
member.summary: Any errors that occurred.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaPipelineResult.CommandCount
member.summary: Total number of commands.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaPipelineResult.SuccessCount
member.summary: Number of successful commands.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaPipelineResult.AllSucceeded
member.summary: Whether all commands succeeded.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaPipelineResult.Duration
member.summary: Total duration of the pipeline.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaPipeline
member.summary: Command pipeline for batching multiple VedaDB operations. Reduces round-trips by sending commands together.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaPipeline.Count
member.summary: Number of commands in the pipeline.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaPipeline.IsAtomic
member.summary: Whether to execute as a transaction (all or nothing).

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaPipeline.#ctor(VedaDB.VedaClient)
member.summary: Create a pipeline.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaPipeline.AddQuery(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Add a query command to the pipeline.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaPipeline.AddExecute(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Add a write command (INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE) to the pipeline.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaPipeline.AddInsert(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object})
member.summary: Add an INSERT command.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaPipeline.AddUpdate(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.String)
member.summary: Add an UPDATE command.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaPipeline.AddDelete(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add a DELETE command.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaPipeline.Atomic
member.summary: Mark this pipeline as atomic (transactional).

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaPipeline.Clear
member.summary: Clear all commands from the pipeline.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaPipeline.ExecuteAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute all commands in the pipeline.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaPipeline.ExecuteAndGetResultsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute and return results as a list.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaProtocol
member.summary: Low-level wire protocol handler for VedaDB communication. Manages the TCP connection, TLS upgrade, and message framing.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaProtocol.Host
member.summary: Server hostname or IP address.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaProtocol.Port
member.summary: Server TCP port.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaProtocol.TimeoutMs
member.summary: Connection timeout in milliseconds.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaProtocol.IsTls
member.summary: Whether the connection uses TLS encryption.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaProtocol.IsConnected
member.summary: Whether the connection is currently active.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaProtocol.IsAuthenticated
member.summary: Whether the connection is authenticated.

member.name: E:VedaDB.VedaProtocol.MessageSent
member.summary: Event raised when a message is sent.

member.name: E:VedaDB.VedaProtocol.MessageReceived
member.summary: Event raised when a message is received.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaProtocol.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: Create a new protocol handler.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaProtocol.ConnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Connect to the server.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaProtocol.Connect
member.summary: Connect synchronously.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaProtocol.UpgradeToTlsAsync(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Perform STARTTLS handshake and upgrade the connection to TLS.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaProtocol.UpgradeToTls(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Upgrade to TLS synchronously.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaProtocol.AuthenticateAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Authenticate with the server using AUTH command.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaProtocol.Authenticate(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Authenticate synchronously.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaProtocol.SendAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Send a command and receive the response.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaProtocol.Send(System.String)
member.summary: Send a command synchronously.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaProtocol.SendRawAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Send a raw line without parsing.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaProtocol.ReconnectAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Reconnect to the server.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaProtocol.CloseAsync
member.summary: Send a QUIT command and close the underlying connection.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaMessage
member.summary: A pub/sub message from VedaDB.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaMessage.Channel
member.summary: Channel name.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaMessage.Payload
member.summary: Message payload.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaMessage.ReceivedAt
member.summary: Timestamp when received.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaPubSub
member.summary: Publish/Subscribe messaging for VedaDB. Implements real-time message passing between clients.

member.name: E:VedaDB.VedaPubSub.MessageReceived
member.summary: Event raised when a message is received on any channel.

member.name: E:VedaDB.VedaPubSub.Subscribed
member.summary: Event raised when subscribed to a channel.

member.name: E:VedaDB.VedaPubSub.Unsubscribed
member.summary: Event raised when unsubscribed from a channel.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaPubSub.IsListening
member.summary: Whether the listener is running.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaPubSub.Channels
member.summary: List of subscribed channels.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaPubSub.#ctor(VedaDB.VedaClient)
member.summary: Create a Pub/Sub instance.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaPubSub.SubscribeAsync(System.String,System.Func{VedaDB.VedaMessage,System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Subscribe to a channel with a handler callback.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaPubSub.SubscribeAsync(System.String,System.Action{VedaDB.VedaMessage},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Subscribe to a channel with a synchronous handler.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaPubSub.SubscribeAsync(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String},System.Func{VedaDB.VedaMessage,System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Subscribe to multiple channels at once.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaPubSub.UnsubscribeAsync(System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Unsubscribe from a channel.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaPubSub.PublishAsync(System.String,System.String,System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Publish a message to a channel.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaPubSub.Publish(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Publish a message to a channel (synchronous).

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaPubSub.ListenAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Listen for messages on subscribed channels.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaPubSub.OnMessageReceived(VedaDB.VedaMessage)
member.summary: Process a received message.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaPubSub.UnsubscribeAllAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Unsubscribe from all channels.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder
member.summary: Fluent query builder for VedaDB. Provides a type-safe, chainable API for constructing SQL queries.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.#ctor(VedaDB.VedaClient,System.String)
member.summary: Create a query builder for a table.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.Select(System.String[])
member.summary: Select specific columns.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.Distinct
member.summary: Add DISTINCT modifier.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.Where(System.String)
member.summary: Add WHERE clause.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.Where(System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Add WHERE column = value.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.Where(System.String,System.String,System.Object)
member.summary: Add WHERE column operator value.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.WhereIn(System.String,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.Object})
member.summary: Add WHERE IN clause.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.WhereLike(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add WHERE LIKE clause.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.WhereNull(System.String)
member.summary: Add WHERE NULL check.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.WhereNotNull(System.String)
member.summary: Add WHERE NOT NULL check.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.OrderBy(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Add ORDER BY clause.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.Limit(System.Int32)
member.summary: Add LIMIT clause.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.Offset(System.Int32)
member.summary: Add OFFSET clause.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.Join(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add INNER JOIN.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.LeftJoin(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add LEFT JOIN.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.GroupBy(System.String[])
member.summary: Add GROUP BY clause.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.Having(System.String)
member.summary: Add HAVING clause.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.ForUpdate
member.summary: Add FOR UPDATE clause.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.BuildSql
member.summary: Build the SQL query string.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.ExecuteAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute the built query.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.FirstAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute and get first row, or null if empty.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.ScalarAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute and get a single scalar value.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.MapAsync``1(System.Func{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},``0},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute and get mapped results.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.ToDictsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute and get results as dictionaries.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.CountAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Count rows matching the current filters.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.ExistsAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Check if any rows match the current filters.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.InsertAsync(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Build an INSERT query for this table.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.UpdateAsync(System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.Object},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Build an UPDATE query from current filters.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryBuilder.DeleteAsync(System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Build a DELETE query from current filters.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaQueryCacheConfig
member.summary: Configuration for the query cache.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaQueryCacheConfig.MaxEntries
member.summary: Maximum number of cached entries. Default is 1000.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaQueryCacheConfig.DefaultTtl
member.summary: Default TTL for cached entries. Default is 60 seconds.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaQueryCacheConfig.Enabled
member.summary: Whether caching is enabled. Default is true.

member.name: T:VedaDB.CacheEntry
member.summary: A cached entry with expiration.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaQueryCache
member.summary: In-memory query cache for VedaDB results. Provides time-based expiration and LRU eviction.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaQueryCache.HitCount
member.summary: Number of cache hits.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaQueryCache.MissCount
member.summary: Number of cache misses.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaQueryCache.Count
member.summary: Current number of entries.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaQueryCache.HitRate
member.summary: Cache hit rate (0.0 to 1.0).

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryCache.#ctor
member.summary: Create a query cache with default configuration.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryCache.#ctor(VedaDB.VedaQueryCacheConfig)
member.summary: Create a query cache with specified configuration.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryCache.Get(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Get a cached result if available and not expired.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryCache.Set(System.String,VedaDB.VedaResult,System.Object[])
member.summary: Cache a result for the default TTL.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryCache.Set(System.String,VedaDB.VedaResult,System.TimeSpan,System.Object[])
member.summary: Cache a result with a specific TTL.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryCache.Invalidate(System.String,System.Object[])
member.summary: Invalidate a cached entry.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryCache.InvalidatePattern(System.String)
member.summary: Invalidate all cache entries matching a pattern.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryCache.Clear
member.summary: Clear all cache entries.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaQueryCache.GetStats
member.summary: Get cache statistics.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaQueryCacheStats
member.summary: Statistics for the query cache.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaResult
member.summary: Represents the result of a VedaDB query.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaResult.ToDicts
member.summary: Convert rows to a list of dictionaries keyed by column name.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaResult.First
member.summary: Get the first row as a dictionary, or null if empty.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaResult.Pluck(System.String)
member.summary: Extract a single column's values as a list.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaResult.Scalar
member.summary: Get a single scalar value from the first row, first column.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaResult.HasRows
member.summary: Check if the result has any rows.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaResult.IsEmpty
member.summary: Check if the result is empty (no rows).

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaResult.Map``1(System.Func{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},``0})
member.summary: Get rows as a list of strongly-typed objects using a mapper function.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaResult.MapFirst``1(System.Func{System.Collections.Generic.Dictionary{System.String,System.String},``0})
member.summary: Get the first row mapped to a strongly-typed object, or default if empty.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaRetryConfig
member.summary: Configuration for retry behavior with exponential backoff.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaRetryConfig.MaxRetries
member.summary: Maximum number of retry attempts. Default is 3.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaRetryConfig.InitialDelayMs
member.summary: Initial delay between retries in milliseconds. Default is 1000.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaRetryConfig.BackoffMultiplier
member.summary: Backoff multiplier. Default is 2.0 (exponential).

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaRetryConfig.MaxDelayMs
member.summary: Maximum delay between retries in milliseconds. Default is 30000.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaRetryConfig.JitterFactor
member.summary: Optional jitter factor (0.0 to 1.0) to randomize delays. Default is 0.1.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaRetryConfig.RetryableExceptions
member.summary: Exception types that should trigger a retry.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaRetryConfig.IsRetryable
member.summary: Custom predicate to determine if an exception is retryable.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaRetryPolicy
member.summary: Retry policy with exponential backoff for VedaDB operations.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaRetryPolicy.#ctor
member.summary: Create a retry policy with default configuration.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaRetryPolicy.#ctor(VedaDB.VedaRetryConfig)
member.summary: Create a retry policy with the specified configuration.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaRetryPolicy.ExecuteAsync``1(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute an async operation with retry.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaRetryPolicy.ExecuteAsync(System.Func{System.Threading.Tasks.Task},System.Threading.CancellationToken)
member.summary: Execute an async operation without a return value.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaRetryPolicy.Execute``1(System.Func{``0})
member.summary: Execute a sync operation with retry.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaRetryPolicy.CalculateDelay(System.Int32)
member.summary: Calculate the delay for a given retry attempt.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaRetryPolicy.IsRetryable(System.Exception)
member.summary: Check if an exception is retryable.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaRetryPolicy.Default
member.summary: Create a default retry policy.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaRetryPolicy.Aggressive
member.summary: Create an aggressive retry policy with more retries and shorter delays.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaRetryPolicy.Conservative
member.summary: Create a conservative retry policy with fewer retries and longer delays.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaRWSplitConfig
member.summary: Read/Write splitting configuration.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaRWSplitConfig.PrimaryHost
member.summary: Primary (write) node host.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaRWSplitConfig.PrimaryPort
member.summary: Primary (write) node port.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaRWSplitConfig.Replicas
member.summary: Replica (read) nodes.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaRWSplitConfig.FallbackToPrimary
member.summary: Whether to fallback to primary for reads if no replicas are available.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaRWSplitConfig.MaxReplicationLagMs
member.summary: Replication lag threshold in milliseconds. 0 means no check.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaRWSplit
member.summary: Read/Write splitter for VedaDB. Routes write operations to the primary and read operations to replicas.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaRWSplit.Primary
member.summary: The primary (write) client.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaRWSplit.#ctor(VedaDB.VedaRWSplitConfig)
member.summary: Create a read/write splitter.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaRWSplit.#ctor(VedaDB.VedaClient,System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{VedaDB.VedaClient})
member.summary: Create a read/write splitter with explicit clients.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaRWSplit.WriteAsync(System.Func{VedaDB.VedaClient,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{VedaDB.VedaResult}})
member.summary: Execute a write operation on the primary.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaRWSplit.ReadAsync(System.Func{VedaDB.VedaClient,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{VedaDB.VedaResult}})
member.summary: Execute a read operation on a replica (or primary if no replicas).

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaRWSplit.WriteAsync``1(System.Func{VedaDB.VedaClient,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}})
member.summary: Execute a write operation that returns a different type.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaRWSplit.ReadAsync``1(System.Func{VedaDB.VedaClient,System.Threading.Tasks.Task{``0}})
member.summary: Execute a read operation that returns a different type.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaRWSplit.AddReplica(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Add a new replica dynamically.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaRWSplit.RemoveReplica(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Remove a replica.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaRWSplit.GetReplicationLagAsync
member.summary: Check replication lag on all replicas.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaRWSplit.ReplicaCount
member.summary: Number of configured replicas.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaTlsConfig
member.summary: TLS/SSL configuration for VedaDB connections.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaTlsConfig.Enabled
member.summary: Whether to use TLS encryption.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaTlsConfig.ValidateCertificate
member.summary: Whether to validate the server certificate. Set to false only for development/testing.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaTlsConfig.ClientCertificatePath
member.summary: Path to a client certificate file (PFX format).

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaTlsConfig.ClientCertificatePassword
member.summary: Password for the client certificate.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaTlsConfig.CustomRootCertificates
member.summary: Collection of custom root CA certificates for validation.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaTlsConfig.Protocols
member.summary: Allowed TLS protocol versions.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaTlsConfig.CipherSuites
member.summary: Cipher suites to allow (if supported by the runtime).

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaTlsConfig.CertificateValidationCallback
member.summary: Callback for remote certificate validation. If set, overrides ValidateCertificate.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaTlsConfig.EnabledConfig
member.summary: Create a TLS configuration with defaults (enabled with validation).

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaTlsConfig.DevelopmentConfig
member.summary: Create a TLS configuration for development (no validation).

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaTlsConfig.DisabledConfig
member.summary: Create a TLS configuration that is disabled.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaTlsConfig.LoadClientCertificate
member.summary: Load a client certificate from the specified path.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaUri
member.summary: Parsed VedaDB connection URI.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaUri.Host
member.summary: Server host.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaUri.Port
member.summary: Server port.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaUri.Username
member.summary: Username for authentication.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaUri.Password
member.summary: Password for authentication.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaUri.Database
member.summary: Database name.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaUri.UseTls
member.summary: Whether to use TLS.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaUri.TimeoutMs
member.summary: Connection timeout in milliseconds.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaUri.PoolMinSize
member.summary: Connection pool minimum size.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaUri.PoolMaxSize
member.summary: Connection pool maximum size.

member.name: P:VedaDB.VedaUri.Options
member.summary: Additional query parameters.

member.name: T:VedaDB.VedaUriParser
member.summary: Parses VedaDB connection URIs. Format: vedadb://[user:pass@]host[:port][/database][?option=value&...]

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaUriParser.Parse(System.String)
member.summary: Parse a VedaDB connection URI.
member.exception: Thrown when the URI is invalid.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaUriParser.ToConfig(VedaDB.VedaUri)
member.summary: Build a VedaConfig from a parsed URI.

member.name: M:VedaDB.VedaUriParser.ParseToConfig(System.String)
member.summary: Parse a URI directly to a VedaConfig.
